faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Franklin Square typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method required. We offer free inspections to provide accurate quotes and can customize treatment plans to fit your budget.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Franklin Square homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Franklin Square homes take 4-8 hours for heat treatment or 2-3 hours for chemical application. Multiple visits may be necessary depending on infestation severity. Our technicians work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my Franklin Square family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. For chemical treatments, we recommend a brief 2-4 hour absence from treated areas. Heat treatments are completely chemical-free and safe to return to immediately after completion.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee bed bug elimination in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We provide a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments in Franklin Square. Our service includes follow-up inspections and retreatment if necessary at no additional cost within the warranty period, ensuring complete elimination of your bed bug problem.
